# Frontier-derived Red consultation queue (routing only)

Read-only queue of Red-bound questions surfaced by the Frontier Canonicalization Initiative. These are
**drafts for the maintainer to slot into a future Red packet** — they do NOT edit the curated, scoped
Wave 2 / Wave 3 packets (`exploration/red-consolidation/RED_WAVE2_PACKET.md`,
`exploration/red-wave-3-packet-2026-05-19/RED_WAVE3_PACKET.md`), both of which are deliberately 6
questions and approval-pending. Sending is the maintainer's action. No Red contact here; routing only.

## ROUTED 2026-05-29 — Zulu head-path registration

**Question (packet-ready).** The head-path family has four members — ducking, diving, weaving, zulu.
Three (`ducking`, `diving`, `weaving`) are registered modifiers; **`zulu` is not.** The FM corpus uses
it as an operator (e.g. `odula` = "Blurry Zulu Blender"). Should `zulu` be registered as a head-path
modifier?
- **Q.A — Register?** Is `zulu` a canonical head-path modifier (the 4th member of ducking/diving/weaving/zulu), or is it a folk synonym / variant of an existing head-path move?
- **Q.B — Weight.** If registered, is its ADD contribution +1 (parallel to ducking/diving/weaving)?
- **Q.C — Family doctrine.** Does registering `zulu` complete the four-way head-path family as a closed
  set, or is the family open-ended?

Governance note: this is a **head-path / topology family** question, so it sits under both Red doctrine
and the topology-governance guardrail (observational ≠ canonical; do not register without the ruling).
Evidence is FM-single-source (frequency ≠ authority) — registration waits on the ruling. Source:
`OPERATOR_INTAKE_FMFOLK.md`.

## Already-noted frontier Red-bound items (consolidated for the same queue)

These were flagged Red-bound earlier in the initiative; listed here so the maintainer has the full
frontier queue in one place. Each gates multiple tricks, so one ruling unblocks several.

- **DOD-policy** — the double-over-down ADD-interpretation doctrine (no-plant / double-OUT reading).
  Gates spinning-ducking-symposium-double-over-down (in 7-ADD catalog), miraging-symposium-double-over-down,
  shooting-double-over-down, the `superdeeduperfly` alias, cold-fusion, your-mom, your-sister.
- **Blurry-transitivity** — is `blurry ≡ stepping + paradox`? (Wave 2 Q1 territory.) Gates blurry-ducking-torque
  (gauntlet's FM name), blurry-chainsaw-massacre, odula, sasquatch.
- **Atomic-rotational-Q3** — atomic +2 / X-Dex carry on rotational bases. (Wave 2 atomic-family territory.)
  Gates atomic + atomic-torque op_notation, icarus, super-ego.
- **Illusioning registration** (+ the `flailing` companion) — is a gerund-of-a-base (illusioning / flailing)
  a registrable operator? Settling the general rule covers both. (Already in `OPERATOR_TRIAGE.md`'s Red section.)

Note: blurry-transitivity and atomic-family overlap the pending Wave 2 questions; if Wave 2 answers them,
these resolve without a new packet. DOD-policy, zulu, and the gerund-operator rule are net-new and need a
future packet slot.
